Build your day-by-day plan

⚡ AI

Generates a dated schedule from today to your exam. Each day has a focus topic, checkable study tasks, a video to watch, and a guideline reference to read.

⚡ AI

Topic of the day

A focused, expert-level brief — exact cutoffs, the current algorithm with each branch, pearls, pitfalls, recent evidence.

Ask an expert

Ask any echocardiography question. Answers are written at consultant level and cite the relevant guideline or literature. Not a substitute for clinical judgement on real patients.

Reading library

On-device

Open your own PDF textbooks and read them here, page by page. The first time you open a book it's saved into this app's on-device storage, so afterwards you reopen it with a single tap — no re-selecting. Nothing is uploaded; books stay on this device and per-device.

Trusted echo channels

Verified sources

Hand-picked, real channels used by cardiology fellows worldwide — society channels, leading courses, case libraries, and Mayo Clinic teaching.

Latest guidelines by topic

✓ Verified

The current ASE / EACVI / ESC document for each echo topic — the source of truth behind the cutoffs you're learning. Each opens the society's official page; the search link is a fail-safe that always resolves to the document. Verify cutoffs here before relying on them.

Settings

Exam targets

AI backend

Claude → Groq

The app uses Claude for all clinical content — it is held to a verified set of ASE/EACVI reference values on every call. Groq is an optional fast fallback. Keys are saved in this browser only — never in the GitHub repo. Each colleague enters their own key on their own device.

⚠︎ Never paste your key into index.html or commit it — GitHub's secret scanner will detect it and Groq will auto-revoke the key. If your key stopped working, that is almost certainly why: generate a fresh one in the Groq console and enter it here.

Sync

Firebase project echo-prep · collections namespaced echoprep_*.

Use the same email/password you registered with on the other EchoPrep app — your sync data is kept separate (in echoprep_users).

About

EchoPrep Studio — single-file PWA · repo Ahmedshafie85/Echo-preparation. Day-by-day study plan, AI MCQs with references, expert Q&A, and video library.
